---
title: "Matthew Lyle"
subtitle: "Associate Professor of Accounting"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: profile.jpg
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 14em
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:matthew.lyle@emory.edu
    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}} Scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=YOUR_ID
    - text: "{{< ai ssrn >}} SSRN"
      href: https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/cf_dev/AbsByAuth.cfm?per_id=YOUR_ID
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/mlyle6
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/YOUR-HANDLE
---

I am an Associate Professor of Accounting at the [Goizueta Business School](https://goizueta.emory.edu/), Emory University. I also serve as Area Coordinator for the Accounting area.

My research focuses on accounting-based valuation, capital markets, and the design of systematic trading strategies. My work has appeared in *The Accounting Review*, the *Journal of Financial Economics*, and the *Review of Accounting Studies*.

## Recent

- *[Date]* New working paper posted: [paper title]
- *[Date]* Presenting at [conference / seminar]
- *[Date]* [Other update]
